description: Global error workflow — wired as settings.errorWorkflow on every MailBOX workflow. Fires whenever any workflow execution errors (the failure mode behind STAQPRO-287's ghost stubs: n8n nodes have 0 retries and errors died silently until an operator noticed). Formats a single HTML alert email (workflow, failed node, error message, execution URL) and sends it via the appliance Gmail OAuth credential, same delivery path as MailBOX-AlertCheck. Per-source-workflow throttle via workflow static data (default 60 min, ERROR_ALERT_THROTTLE_MIN) so a broken 5-min poller emails once an hour, not 12 times. Recipient: ERROR_ALERT_RECIPIENT, falling back to MAILBOX_OPERATOR_EMAIL. Must be active=true; do NOT set an errorWorkflow on this workflow itself.
name: MailBOX-ErrorHandler
